items.title: The dot-com crash was a $5 trillion blip. Why the next financial crisis could hit 4 times harder.
items.description: The next global financial crisis is already under way. Here is how it will unfold.

items.title: Corporate America is pumping $1 trillion into stock buybacks — but look at what insiders are doing
items.description: These 22 U.S. stocks are backed by company buybacks and insider cash.

items.title: What the big housing bill means for buyers as home prices hit new record high
items.description: President Trump is refusing to sign the housing bill, but it will still become law on Saturday. Here’s what it does — and doesn’t — do.

items.title: Delta faces jet-fuel jitters even as it sees strong travel demand
items.description: Delta’s profit dropped as the air carrier absorbed the highest quarterly fuel expense in its history.

items.title: SK Hynix’s stock pops in its Nasdaq debut
items.description: The South Korean memory company’s American depositary receipts begin trading on Friday.

items.title: My doctor friend objected to his hospital’s fundraising tactics. Did management go too far?
items.description: “This shocking program was exploiting doctors and the trust inherent in their relationships with patients.”

items.title: All entry-level jobs require 3-5 years of experience. How am I supposed to get that if no one will hire me?
items.description: How to get experience if no one is willing to be your first employer.

items.title: The space race is on as China takes a big step toward rivaling SpaceX
items.description: A Chinese company demonstrated controlled recovery of a rocket’s bottom portion, which is critical in helping to drive down launch costs.

items.title: Half of small-business owners hope to sell their companies and retire in the next decade. What happens to their workers?
items.description: “It’s an American tragedy” when small businesses close up shop.

items.title: Only 5% of U.S. adults can ace this 8-question financial-literacy test. Can you?
items.description: Financial literacy just hit a 10-year low — and it is devastating bank accounts.
